{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206485888F687348F21E27CB154"}"},"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619274759390626622","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哥们写正经小说屈才了[酷]我这有条通天大道你走不走[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774004611,"group_id":"7615845836483742782","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便写写，打发时间，勿怪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxHiVSmu2BLN1WTkRmDmL8H+gTYeXftQpDYQ+nKbXkIr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/66d084155ad545a390bb8ef843564994~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702545&x-signature=SDrwLeQzYWeAk%2BgOtz3CZMOmGbk%3D","user_id":"2316005313883147","user_name":"最佳PlanB"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2316005313883147","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7615845836483742782","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越这种事，最操蛋的不是你什么都没了，而是你明明什么都有，系统却告诉你等级不足，无法使用。
凌小白现在就深有体会。十分钟前他还是全服第一狂战士，十分钟后，他被一头屁股带桃心的野猪追得满山跑。
自己堂堂天花板玩家，现在连猪都能欺负他？
女儿岛的丛林里，凌小白开始了真人版《荒野求生》。
他拼尽全力升到1级，结果还没来得及高兴，一抬头，一双完美大长腿停在他面前。再往上，是冷若冰霜的脸，和头顶那串深不见底的血条。
“蛇姬大人！有入侵者！”
长戟哐地戳在他两腿之间，离要害只差三厘米。凌小白咽了口唾沫：“那个……如果我说我是迷路的游客，你们信吗？”
“信你个鬼！跪下受死！”
凌小白终于意识到一个严肃的问题：在这个世界，美女是真的会杀人的。
而有些人的命，从穿越那一刻起，就注定不太平。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob50a79a12005efa16195de02ed306876~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"文羽小贝","author_id":"","book_id":"7615845836483742782","book_name":"海贼：这个海贼不讲武德","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0b8a0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1408人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7615848532263567934","read_count":"1408","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"116678"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"32","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,海贼,系统,穿越,女帝,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob50a79a12005efa16195de02ed306876~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317338&x-signature=5C2%2FuPyrJ2C3X81fiAzq9rkolY0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1849821349820183","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelap
